venues.name: International Conference on Learning Representations

commands.name: pull
commands.command: python -m secondopinion.tools.openreview_pull --venue ICLR --year 2025 --invitation ICLR.cc/2025/Conference/-/Submission --output data/normalized/iclr_2025_full.json --details replies --page-size 100 --polite-delay 0.2 --snapshot iclr_2025_full

notes: Spec target: full 2025 ICLR public OpenReview corpus.
ICLR is treated as fully open public review scope; API probe confirms concrete review availability once OpenReview auth/challenge is satisfied.

venues.name: International Conference on Machine Learning

commands.name: pull
commands.command: python -m secondopinion.tools.openreview_pull --venue ICML --year 2025 --invitation ICML.cc/2025/Conference/-/Submission --output data/normalized/icml_2025_full.json --details replies --page-size 100 --polite-delay 0.2 --snapshot icml_2025_full

notes: Spec target: public ICML 2025 reviews, accepted plus public opt-in rejected papers where visible.
ICML is treated as partial public review scope; API probe determines exact public coverage after OpenReview auth/challenge is satisfied.

venues.name: Neural Information Processing Systems

commands.command: python -m secondopinion.tools.openreview_pull --venue NEURIPS --year 2025 --invitation NeurIPS.cc/2025/Conference/-/Submission --output data/normalized/neurips_2025_full.json --details replies --page-size 100 --polite-delay 0.2 --snapshot neurips_2025_full

venues.name: Transactions on Machine Learning Research

commands.name: pull
commands.command: python -m secondopinion.tools.openreview_pull --venue TMLR --year 2025 --invitation TMLR/-/Submission --output data/normalized/tmlr_2025_full_unfiltered.json --details replies --page-size 100 --polite-delay 0.2 --snapshot tmlr_2025_full

notes: Rolling OpenReview journal: pull all public submissions, then filter by 2025 decision/activity.
Second-round probe confirms public replies exist on older/decided submissions, but latest under-review submissions have no public replies.
TMLR needs a rolling extractor that filters decided/activity-2025 submissions and reads paper-level Official_Comment threads.
Rolling venue: full pull must filter by 2025 decision or activity date after download.

venues.name: Conference on Language Modeling

commands.command: python -m secondopinion.tools.openreview_pull --venue COLM --year 2025 --invitation colmweb.org/COLM/2025/Conference/-/Submission --output data/normalized/colm_2025_full.json --details replies --page-size 100 --polite-delay 0.2 --snapshot colm_2025_full

notes: Probe on 2026-07-08 found public official reviews on colmweb.org/COLM/2025/Conference/-/Submission: 20/20 sampled papers, 75 reviews.
